creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: Protobuf is optional, for .. "Parsing of OSM PBF files." So that's a specialized Open Street Map function. It wasn't enabled / used before, and still isn't. The Qt testlib was the actual cause of the configure failure. (CMake is not super clear in cases like this, where one optional thing isn't found and it looks like that that is the cause).
